title: MCP server — query tools, analytical tools, resources over stdio
description: Implement lookout-go mcp command. Query tools: query_traces, query_sessions, get_session, get_stats, get_anomalies, query_metrics. Analytical tools: analyze_session, compare_models, suggest_optimizations. Resources: lookout://stats, lookout://sessions/recent. Uses github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go.

title: TUI dashboard — bubbletea + lipgloss, overview/spans/anomalies tabs, live refresh, scrollable tables
OTLP gRPC receiver — google.golang.org/grpc server on :4317, accept ExportTraceServiceRequest, convert to SpanRecord, store
close_reason: Superseded by lookout-go-pmy (updated scope with MetricsService)

title: SQLite store — modernc.org/sqlite, WAL mode, spans table with AI columns, indexes, insert/query/stats/cleanup
close_reason: Implemented: SQLite store with spans + metric_rollups tables, full CRUD + stats

title: Dockerfile + CI — multi-stage build, GitHub Actions
description: Multi-stage Dockerfile for minimal image. GitHub Actions: test on PR, build+push to ghcr.io on main.

title: AI enrichment — cost calculation from model pricing table, token throughput, anomaly detection (long duration, high tokens, errors)
close_reason: Implemented: cost calculation, token throughput, anomaly detection

title: Session grouping — correlate spans into agent sessions by trace ID and agent.session_id, sessions query
Dockerfile + CI — multi-stage Go build, GitHub Actions test on PR, build+push to ghcr.io on main
CLI scaffold — cmd/lookout with serve, dash, query subcommands, flag parsing, env var fallback
close_reason: Implemented: serve + query subcommands with rich filtering and output formats

title: Ring buffer — in-memory fixed-capacity ring for recent spans, thread-safe with sync.RWMutex
close_reason: Implemented: thread-safe ring buffer with push/recent/batch

title: WebSocket live stream — WS /v1/live endpoint using nhooyr.io/websocket, broadcast incoming spans to connected clients
Push metrics — configurable HTTP POST of aggregated stats to external URL on interval
Analytics API — net/http on :4320, /v1/traces, /v1/traces/{id}, /v1/recent, /v1/stats, /v1/stats/by-model, /v1/stats/by-agent, /v1/stats/cost, /v1/sessions, /v1/anomalies, /health
close_reason: Implemented: full analytics API with traces, sessions, stats, metrics, anomalies, health, WebSocket endpoints

title: OTLP HTTP receiver — net/http on :4318, POST /v1/traces, accept protobuf and JSON content types
close_reason: Implemented: OTLP HTTP receiver with /v1/traces + /v1/metrics handlers

title: OTLP gRPC receiver — TraceService + MetricsService on :4317
description: Add gRPC server using google.golang.org/grpc. Implement TraceService/Export and MetricsService/Export. Convert to SpanRecord/MetricRollup, enrich, store. Wire into serve command alongside HTTP receiver.

title: Proto codegen — vendor opentelemetry-proto, generate Go types with protoc-gen-go, wire into gRPC + HTTP receivers
close_reason: Replaced by go.opentelemetry.io/proto/otlp package - no codegen needed

title: Web UI — templ + htmx embedded dashboard on :4320/ui/
description: Embedded web UI served from the analytics API port. Pages: dashboard, traces list, trace detail, sessions list, session detail, metrics, anomalies. Uses github.com/a-h/templ for type-safe templates and htmx for dynamic updates. Minimal CSS (pico.css). No npm or JS build step.
close_reason: Implemented Web UI with templ + htmx on :4320/ui/ — dashboard, traces, sessions, anomalies pages with live htmx polling, pico.css dark theme, status/anomaly badges
